## What does this PR do?

Brief description of the change.

## Type of change

- [ ] New skill
- [ ] Fix to existing skill
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Tool / script

## Skill checklist (for skill changes)

- [ ] Trigger section is specific — "when the user wants X"
- [ ] Every procedure step names a concrete data source or action
- [ ] Output section shows the exact format (table, JSON, or labeled fields)
- [ ] Limitations section exists and is honest
- [ ] Handoff block specifies `next_skill`
- [ ] Confidence levels used where data quality varies
- [ ] `./validate-skills.sh` passes

## Notes for reviewers

Any context that would help the review.
